{%- extends "!search.html" %} {# Suppress basic theme's "Searching for multiple words…" line, redundant once we have our own prominent input at the top. #} {% block searchtext %}{% endblock %} {# Replace the basic theme's tiny default form with our prominent one. The hidden inputs preserve search semantics. #} {% block searchbox %} {# Empty action submits to the current URL, so this works under any builder (dirhtml serves this page as /search/, not search.html). #}
{% endblock %}
